skill1.kitLine: Drunken: Hit Rate ▼ 20% per stack (self, on Burst-stage-1 entry), stacks up to 3 continuously
skill1.note: Per-stack hit-rate down is folded into a flat -40% normal-attack damage on self (cycle-avg 2 stacks x 20%). The 3-stack accumulation/reset itself has no dedicated block: it is encoded indirectly via the everyN:3 Hangover gate in skill2[1] plus the note's dynamic-cycle description, while all x-stacks buff magnitudes use the static avg=2. ks F4: this -40% is DAMAGE-ONLY — burst gauge is NOT reduced for the ~40% missed rounds (gauge over-credit).

skill1.kitLine: Critical Rate ▲ 20.05% (all allies, only while in Drunken status), continuously
skill1.where: skill1[0] -> buff critRatePct 20.05, target allies, passive
skill1.note: Value byte-exact. Drunken-presence gate is NOT modeled — buff is permanent. Documented approximation: slight overcount during the ~1 rotation after each Hangover before she re-stacks, and全程 when she never bursts.

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 35.02% of the skill user's ATK (all allies, only while in Drunken status), continuously
skill1.where: skill1[0] -> buff casterAtkPct 35.02, target allies, passive
skill1.note: Value byte-exact, caster-ATK scaling correct. Same un-modeled Drunken gate as the crit-rate line — kept permanent (flagged overcount).

skill2.kitLine: Distributed Damage ▲ 15.03% x number of Drunken stacks for 10 sec (all allies, on entering Burst Stage 3 while Drunken)
skill2.where: skill2[0] -> buff distributedDamagePct 30.06, durationSec 10, target allies, trigger stageEnter stage 3
skill2.note: 30.06 = 15.03 x 2 (static cycle-average stacks). Stage-3 entry trigger correct; the 'while Drunken' condition is not separately gated. ks: exact for sole-B2 timing.

skill2.kitLine: Reload Speed ▲ 15.04% x number of Drunken stacks for 10 sec (all allies)
skill2.where: skill2[0] -> buff reloadSpeedPct 30.08, durationSec 10, target allies
skill2.note: 30.08 = 15.04 x 2 (static cycle-average stacks). Shares the stage-3 trigger block with the distributed-damage buff.

skill2.kitLine: Hangover: Stunned for 10 sec (self; triggers when Drunken is at max stacks at the end of Full Burst; removes all stacks)
skill2.where: skill2[1] -> stun durationSec 10, target self, trigger burstCast, everyN 3
skill2.note: Q5 RECALIBRATED + flagged for manual review: gate moved from prose 'every 3rd Full-Burst-end' to 'every 3rd of HER OWN burst casts'. The 'removes all stacks' reset is represented by this same 3-cycle gate (note's dynamic-cycle description). Her-cast gate validated on bursting Mast (T1); never-bursting Mast (T7) previously over-stunned to 0.84 cold under the FB-end reading.

burst.where: burst[0] -> buff critDamagePct 40.04, durationSec 10, target allies, trigger burstCast
burst.note: Value byte-exact, unconditional (matches prose 'Affects all allies').

burst.where: burst[0] -> buff attackDamagePct 15.04, durationSec 10, target allies

burst.kitLine: ATK ▲ (20.06% x Number of Drunken stacks) of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec (all allies, if in Drunken status)
burst.where: burst[0] -> buff casterAtkPct 40.12, durationSec 10, target allies
burst.note: 40.12 = 20.06 x 2 (static cycle-average stacks), caster-ATK scaling correct. The 'if in Drunken status' gate is NOT enforced — kept permanent even when she never bursts (documented approximation).

documentedConfounds.text: S1 'while Drunken' team buffs (Crit Rate 20.05%, 35.02% caster ATK) and the burst's Drunken-gated ATK buff are modeled PERMANENT, not gated on Drunken presence.
documentedConfounds.why: Sim keeps these team buffs always on, slightly overpredicting ally damage — most notably during the ~1 rotation after each Hangover before she re-stacks, and全程 for a never-bursting Mast. Works in the HOT (overpredict) direction; board is OK so it is a known minor overcount, not a live gap.

documentedConfounds.text: Q5 RECALIBRATED (flagged for manual review): Hangover stun re-gated from prose 'every 3rd Full-Burst-end' to 'every 3rd of HER OWN burst casts'.
documentedConfounds.why: Interpretation, not literal prose. The old FB-end gate over-stunned never-bursting Mast (T7) to 0.84 COLD; the her-cast gate fixed that and validated on bursting Mast (T1). Residual risk is two-sided but currently reconciled — flagged so the judge treats any stun-related surprise as KNOWN, not a new finding.

documentedConfounds.text: F4 miss-model: Drunken hit-rate-down is encoded as normalAttackPct -40 which is DAMAGE-ONLY — burst gauge is not reduced for the ~40% missed rounds (gauge over-credit).
documentedConfounds.why: Sim grants full burst gauge on rounds that 'miss', slightly over-crediting burst frequency and thus damage (HOT direction). Second-order; validated against the user's real sample (149M real vs 140M modeled).

documentedConfounds.text: Drunken-stack scaling modeled statically at cycle-average 2 stacks (stacks run 1,2,3 then reset) rather than truly dynamic per-rotation stack count.
documentedConfounds.why: Averages out over the 3-burst cycle and is exact for sole-B2 timing per ks; only a minor intra-cycle timing error, not a systematic HOT/COLD bias.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Mast: Romantic Maid's Drunken cycle as a 3-stack-then-reset rhythm, folding every per-stack magnitude into static cycle-average (x2) buff values and encoding the reset as an everyN:3 self-stun (Hangover) gate; her own MG hit-rate penalty is a flat -40% normal-attack damage on self (avg 2 stacks x 20%), validated against a real 149M-vs-140M sample. There are NO MODELED_CONFIG fields and NO unmodeled-array entries — the entire kit lives in blocks plus the note, and no prose line is silently dropped. Known-not-faithful spots, all flagged in the note: the Drunken-gated team buffs (S1 crit/ATK and burst ATK) are kept permanent rather than gated on Drunken presence (slight HOT overcount), the F4 miss model is damage-only and over-credits burst gauge, and the Q5 Hangover trigger is re-gated to her own burst casts (vs prose Full-Burst-end) and flagged for manual review. Board is OK: ratio 1.023, N=2, MAD 0.023.
